channel.title: RoundSignal - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: RoundSignal 2026-W28: 10 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
RoundSignal Issue 2026-W28

Freshly-funded Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

10 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

Sherpa.ai

heat 88

Trigger: $18M funding round to accelerate its data-privacy/security AI platform for enterprises (Tech.eu, as of 03 Jul 2026)

Why now: Fresh $18M raise means budget to scale an enterprise AI platform - they'll be hiring, building infra and pushing go-to-market fast. Perfect window for dev, RevOps and growth partners.

Who to contact: VP Engineering / Head of Growth

Angle: Reference their data-sovereign AI positioning: offer to build a compliance-ready demo environment or enterprise onboarding funnel that shortens sales cycles for privacy-conscious buyers.

source

StirlingX

heat 86

Trigger: $20M Series A from Ventura Capital and RCM Private Markets to expand its sovereign intelligence platform (Tech.eu, as of 02 Jul 2026)

Why now: A $20M Series A signals a scale-up phase - hiring, platform expansion and new-market entry. B2B data intelligence firms need RevOps, security and marketing support immediately post-raise.

Who to contact: COO / VP Revenue

Angle: Cite their sovereign-intelligence expansion goal and propose a RevOps/pipeline build to convert the new capital into a repeatable enterprise sales engine.

source

CurifyLabs

heat 84

Trigger: €12M Series A to expand US operations and accelerate its personalised-medicine automation platform (Tech.eu, as of 06 Jul 2026)

Why now: They explicitly plan US expansion - a classic trigger for recruiting, localization, PR and market-entry services. Series A cash + geographic push = many outsourced needs.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of US Expansion

Angle: Open on their US-market entry: offer a launch package (US recruiting, regulatory-savvy PR, or localized growth marketing) to hit the ground running.

source

geoSurge

heat 83

Trigger: €10M ($12M) Seed round led by AlbionVC to expand global research/engineering teams and AI infrastructure (EU-Startups, as of 03 Jul 2026)

Why now: A large Seed earmarked for team expansion and AI compute means active hiring and infra buildout - prime for dev, recruiting and growth partners. Their GEO/AI-visibility niche is directly service-adjacent.

Who to contact: Co-founder / Head of Engineering

Angle: Reference their Corpus Engineering discipline and offer to help scale their engineering hiring pipeline or build demand-gen for brands worried about AI representation.

source

BidScript

heat 74

Trigger: €701k ($800k) pre-Seed (follow-on from NPIF II - PXN), total pre-Seed now €876k+ (EU-Startups, as of 02 Jul 2026)

Why now: AI-native tender-management platform just topped up pre-Seed and reports strong win-rate metrics - they'll invest in growth and product. Small team, lots of outsourced needs.

Who to contact: Founder / Head of Growth

Angle: Cite their 50% higher tender win-rate stat and offer to build a case-study-driven content/PR engine to turn that proof point into inbound leads.

source

Talp

heat 72

Trigger: Raising ~$20M pre-seed (AI customer-simulation personas), Turkish roots (Tech Funding News, as of 02 Jul 2026)

Why now: (unverified) An unusually large pre-seed for an AI-native B2B tool means rapid team-building and GTM spend. Single-source, so verify, but the raise size makes them a high-value early target.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate on the pre-seed and offer to design their first outbound/growth motion so their AI-persona product lands with early B2B design partners.

source

Visiblie

heat 68

Trigger: €500K via convertible loan to grow in the SME market for AI-search visibility (Tech.eu, as of 02 Jul 2026)

Why now: Early-stage B2B SaaS targeting SMEs with fresh capital for growth - they'll need marketing, content and sales enablement help. Small enough that a fractional CMO/growth partner is a fit.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Open on their SME growth goal: propose a lean growth-marketing sprint to validate acquisition channels before they burn the convertible on headcount.

source

Aylight

heat 67

Trigger: €4.5M pre-seed co-led by Elaia and Swisscom Ventures for chip-scale multiwavelength laser tech (Tech.eu, corroborated by Google News, as of 06 Jul 2026)

Why now: Well-funded deep-tech pre-seed backed by named VCs - they'll scale R&D hiring and need employer branding, recruiting and technical PR. Multi-source corroboration raises confidence.

Who to contact: Co-founder / Head of R&D

Angle: Reference their photonics milestone and offer specialist deep-tech recruiting or technical-PR to attract scarce optical-engineering talent.

source

Loopia

heat 55

Trigger: $1.2M seed round (LatamList, as of 01 Jul 2026)

Why now: (unverified) A fresh seed round means a small team with new budget for product and growth. Single thin source - verify the vertical and details before heavy outreach.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate on the seed and offer a fractional growth/RevOps engagement to set up their first repeatable acquisition process.

source

Akro

heat 52

Trigger: $700K pre-seed led by Amigos Venture Capital (TNGlobal, as of 30 Jun 2026)

Why now: (unverified) Singapore-based AI startup with fresh pre-seed - early team, new budget for build and GTM. Off-region for many EU service providers but AI-vertical fit is strong.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their AI focus and offer to help productize their MVP into a demoable B2B offering with early design partners.

source

© RoundSignal. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
